posts.message:
The mapper already gave a viable explanation of their idea. And there's an explanation to why mapping exactly to the sound might not be best here https://osu.ppy.sh/beatmapsets/2534986/discussion/5616379/timeline#/5637806/14854437.

@ImperialTrinity if you have any concrete suggestion for a pattern that follows the sounds more precisely while keeping the smooth flow (which is the mapper's priority), please post it. Otherwise please don't stall the discussion.
